title: G1: Derive the correct posterior $E[Y\mid X=x]$ from an explicit joint model

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body:
The naive step $E[Y\mid X=x]=\tfrac12(2x)+\tfrac12(x/2)=\tfrac54 x$ assumes $P(\text{chosen is smaller}\mid X=x)=P(\text{chosen is larger}\mid X=x)=\tfrac12$ for **every** $x$. This must not be assumed. Model the pair by the smaller amount $A$ with prior $\pi$, envelopes $(A,2A)$, and an independent fair coin $C$. Using Bayes' theorem, prove

$$P(\text{smaller}\mid X=x)=\frac{\pi(x)}{\pi(x)+\pi(x/2)},\quad E[Y\mid X=x]=\frac{2x\,\pi(x)+\tfrac{x}{2}\,\pi(x/2)}{\pi(x)+\pi(x/2)}.\qquad(\star)$$

Then show $(\star)$ reduces to $\tfrac54 x$ **iff** $\pi(x)=\pi(x/2)$ for all $x$. This lemma localizes the contested inference and is the foundation for all later lemmas.
